description: ColE1/pMB1 origin, common cloning-vector form: identical to the canonical pMB1 origin except a benign 2-bp difference (positions 412-413) in the RNA I/RNA II control region; carried by 140+ deposited vectors since 1985.

references.title: Formation of an RNA primer for initiation of replication of ColE1 DNA by ribonuclease H.
references.journal: Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 1980;77(5):2450-4

references.title: Activities of the RNAI and RNAII promoters of plasmid pBR322.

references.authors: Tomizawa J, Itoh T, Selzer G, Som T
references.title: Inhibition of ColE1 RNA primer formation by a plasmid-specified small RNA.
references.journal: Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 1981;78(3):1421-5

label: ColE1_AT
note: ColE1/pMB1 origin, common cloning-vector form: identical to the canonical pMB1 origin except a benign 2-bp difference (positions 412-413) in the RNA I/RNA II control region; carried by 140+ deposited vectors since 1985.

label: RNA II promoter -35
note: Top-strand -35 hexamer (TTGAGA) of the RNA II promoter, which drives the ColE1/pMB1 replication pre-primer transcript.

label: RNA II promoter -10
note: Top-strand -10 hexamer (CGTAAT) of the RNA II promoter, 15 bp downstream of the -35.

label: RNA I promoter -35
note: -35 hexamer of the convergent RNA I promoter on the bottom strand.

label: RNA I promoter -10
note: -10 hexamer of the RNA I promoter on the bottom strand.

provenance.sequence_source: ColE1/pMB1 origin, common cloning-vector form: 100% identical to GenBank X03174 (cloning vector pEX2, 1986) and present in 140+ deposited vectors; the earliest occurrence found is X01803 (Nov 1985, a P-element transformation vector). Differs from the canonical pMB1 origin (pBR322 J01749 / pUC18 L08752) by 2 bp at positions 412-413 in the RNA I/RNA II control region. Identified by date-bracketed BLAST vs NCBI nt (tools/blast.py): 142 perfect full-length carriers in 1985-1996.

functional_claims.label: High-copy ColE1/pMB1 origin; copy number set by the RNA I/RNA II antisense system.

source.quote: The ColE1/pMB1-family origin-of-replication control region: a 792 bp fragment carrying the convergent RNA I / RNA II promoter pair that sets plasmid copy number.

functional_claims.label: Differs from the canonical pMB1 origin (pBR322/pUC) by 2 bp at positions 412-413 in the RNA I/RNA II control region; a long-established, benign cloning-vector form present in 140+ deposited vectors since 1985, so the difference does not impair replication.

source.quote: 100% identity to GenBank X03174 (cloning vector pEX2, 1986) and 142 pre-1997 deposited vectors; earliest X01803 (Nov 1985)
